Perplexity Computer vs OpenClaw: 4 New Updates You Need!

Perplexity just released four massive updates to its AI computer agent, directly challenging OpenClaw's dominance. We test the new mobile app, the Neatron 3 Super model, and the upcoming local "Personal Computer" feature to see which tool wins. Learn how to automate your business and choose the right AI agent for your workflow.
